resources.string: Tap the bubble to capture → select → action wheel
Google AI key (for 🎨 generate, AIza…, optional)
Please enter your Anthropic key first
Bubble is up — screen share will be requested on the first capture
Please allow "Display over other apps", then come back — it continues automatically
Nothing saved yet — select an area and tap 💡 or 🎨

The bubble appears automatically when you open this page (no dialogs). Tap it to capture → select → action wheel (🔍 explain/search · 💡 save · 🛒 shopping · 🎨 generate). The system asks to share your screen once per session, on the first capture.
No captures saved yet — select an area and tap 💡
Stored in the app-private folder; external viewer unavailable
Screen-share permission is required to capture
Screen capture expired — tap the bubble again to re-authorize
Couldn\'t identify the subject — try a different selection
💡 Saved to Pictures/nodx (browse in the in-app library)
🎨 Generate needs a Google AI key — add it on the nodx main screen (free at aistudio.google.com)
🎨 Sonnet is writing the generation prompt… (15–40s)
🎨 Generated and saved to the library
What is this? Answer concisely (2–4 sentences), quoting key numbers/text exactly. Answer in English.
